This page lists git commits from the [https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/aelaki-wikibot aelaki-wikibot] repository.

Short hashes are used in [[Category:Word pages|word page]] version categories (e.g. <nowiki>[[Category:Words abc1234]]</nowiki>).
